svg.title: The Pyde factory cycle
svg.desc: An animated diagram of the Pyde transaction lifecycle. The cycle runs every six seconds. A user submits transactions which fall through a chute onto the mempool conveyor. Some transactions are encrypted, shown as gold padlocks attached to their droplets. Batches form and feed the consensus DAG, which stacks vertices into four floors. An anchor is selected and the wave commits in a bright flash that shakes the factory. The flash also shatters the locks on encrypted transactions, representing threshold decryption. Two robotic arms reach in and stamp executed transactions as state pillars. Smoke rises from the chimney as the cache evicts old data. A receipt droplet exits through the right door back to the user. A small rotation indicator in the corner signifies the eternal nature of the loop.
